name: Wagokoro Co., Ltd.
summary: Wagokoro Co., Ltd. engages in retail, services, and OEM businesses in Japan. The company operates Japanese accessories stores; and sells its products through mail order sites. It also rents Kimono; and manufacture and sells silver accessories, stone bracelets, sunglasses/glasses, buckles, hats, jewelry, umbrella, leather products, and chopsticks. The company operates 67 stores. Wagokoro Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
